title: Learn Numbers for Toddlers | Kids Cartoon #shorts
description:
POP POP! Benny counts SHAPES one, two, three!
Learn numbers for toddlers with bright circles, squares, and triangles.
Preschool kids practice counting 1 to 3 with simple shapes and claps.
Kid-safe educational cartoon for ages 2-8 in American English.
#shorts #kidssongs #preschool #toddler
